source_meta.source_document: Pinnacle Acetabular Cup System Surgical Technique

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Pinnacle revision materials support dedicated acetabular instrumentation for cup preparation and augment-enabled reconstruction workflows.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Pinnacle materials describe the revision acetabular shell family used in reconstructive hip surgery.
Sector augment reconstruction component used to address acetabular bone loss within the Pinnacle revision construct.
Official Pinnacle materials describe compatible liner and bearing options used with the revision acetabular construct.

row.system_notes: Revision acetabular construct anchored to official Pinnacle cup product and surgical-technique materials, with sector augment reconstruction support.
